subcodes.first_line: Say: O people of the Throne! Hearken unto the call of your Lord, the Chosen One, from around the Fire that hath appeared through Its heat [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا اهل العرش ان استمعوا ندآء ربکم المختار من حول النار التی ظهرت من حراره
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
